allow: PowerShell($php = \(Get-Command php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($php\) { "PHP: " + $php.Source; php -v } else { "PHP not found in PATH" })

PowerShell($paths = @\('C:\\laragon\\bin\\php', 'C:\\xampp\\php\\php.exe', 'C:\\wamp64\\bin\\php', 'C:\\php'\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { "FOUND: $p" } }; Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\\' -Filter 'php.exe' -Depth 3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 FullName)

PowerShell(Get-Process php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $php = 'C:\\xampp\\php\\php.exe'; Start-Process -FilePath $php -ArgumentList 'spark','serve','--port','8085' -WorkingDirectory \(Get-Location\) -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; "Server restarted")

PowerShell($candidates = @\("C:\\xampp\\php\\php.exe", "C:\\laragon\\bin\\php", "C:\\wamp64\\bin\\php", "C:\\tools\\php", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\php"\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path $c\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $c" } }; Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source)

PowerShell($php = "C:\\xampp\\php\\php.exe"; & $php -l app\\Views\\partials\\header.php; & $php -l app\\Views\\partials\\nav\\mega-products.php; & $php -l app\\Views\\partials\\nav\\mega-services.php; & $php -l app\\Language\\tr\\Navigation.php; & $php -l app\\Language\\en\\Navigation.php; & $php -l app\\Language\\ru\\Navigation.php; & $php -l app\\Language\\ar\\Navigation.php; & $php -l app\\Language\\fr\\Navigation.php)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8765/tr" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; $html = $r.Content; Write-Output \("mega-srv any: " + \([regex]::Matches\($html, 'mega-srv'\)\).Count\); Write-Output \("mega-srv grid: " + \([regex]::Matches\($html, 'mega-srv__grid'\)\).Count\); Write-Output \("srv links: " + \([regex]::Matches\($html, 'services/[a-z-]+'\)\).Count\); Write-Output \("sub links: " + \([regex]::Matches\($html, 'products/[a-z0-9-]+/[a-z0-9-]+'\)\).Count\); Write-Output \("ar check:"\); $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8765/ar" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output \("AR STATUS: " + $r2.StatusCode + " dir=rtl: " + \([regex]::Matches\($r2.Content, 'dir="rtl"'\)\).Count\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERROR: " + $_.Exception.Message\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8765/tr" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; $html = $r.Content; foreach \($marker in @\('data-categories-carousel', 'hero', 'data-hotspots', 'swiper-wrapper', 'lang-switcher', 'main.js'\)\) { Write-Output \($marker + ": " + \([regex]::Matches\($html, [regex]::Escape\($marker\)\)\).Count\) } } catch { Write-Output \("ERROR: " + $_.Exception.Message\) }; $pid2 = Get-Content _serve_pid.txt; Stop-Process -Id $pid2 -Force -Confirm:$false; Remove-Item _serve_pid.txt -Confirm:$false; Write-Output "server stopped")

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\xampp\\php\\php.exe" -ArgumentList "spark","serve","--port","8765" -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Id | Out-File -Encoding ascii _serve_pid.txt; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8765/tr" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; $html = $r.Content; Write-Output \("STATUS: " + $r.StatusCode\); foreach \($m in @\('mega-chip', 'mega-pane__footer', 'mega-pane__count-num', 'data-categories-carousel'\)\) { Write-Output \($m + ": " + \([regex]::Matches\($html, [regex]::Escape\($m\)\)\).Count\) }; Write-Output \("TR CTA sample present: " + $html.Contains\('25+'\) + " / " + $html.Contains\('İncele'\)\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERROR: " + $_.Exception.Message\) }; $pid2 = Get-Content _serve_pid.txt; Stop-Process -Id $pid2 -Force -Confirm:$false; Remove-Item _serve_pid.txt -Confirm:$false; Write-Output "server stopped")

PowerShell($candidates = @\('C:\\xampp\\php\\php.exe','C:\\laragon\\bin\\php','C:\\wamp64\\bin\\php','C:\\php\\php.exe','C:\\tools\\php\\php.exe',"$env:USERPROFILE\\.config\\herd\\bin\\php.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\php"\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path $c\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $c" } }; Get-Command composer -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source)
